## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (see `test/`) — or the change is doc-only / config-only.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` passes locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the *Unreleased* heading (or "this is a release PR" stated above).
- [ ] User-visible CLI/MCP surface changes also updated in `README.md` and `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] New env vars, network calls, or token surfaces noted in `README.md` *Network use* and `SECURITY.md` as appropriate.
